feed.title: AION Analytics OSS Releases
feed.description: Announcements for AION Analytics public package and model updates.

releases.summary: Timezone fallback fix for environments without system tzdata.
highlights: Added tzdata dependency for ZoneInfo compatibility.
Added pytz fallback for constrained runtimes such as Pyodide.
Corrected naive datetime attachment in fallback mode.
validation: python -c "from aion_indian_market_calendar import IndiaMarketCalendar; from datetime import datetime; import pytz; cal=IndiaMarketCalendar(); print(cal.get_session(datetime(2026,1,27,9,5,tzinfo=pytz.timezone('Asia/Kolkata')), market='NFO') is not None)"

releases.summary: Canonical market resolution fix for aliases and index inputs.
highlights: NFO and FNO now resolve to NSE_EQUITY_DERIVATIVES.
NIFTY and BANKNIFTY now resolve to derivatives by default.
Unknown market inputs now raise ValueError instead of failing silently.
validation: python -c "from aion_indian_market_calendar import IndiaMarketCalendar; from datetime import datetime; import pytz; cal=IndiaMarketCalendar(); dt=datetime(2026,1,27,9,20,tzinfo=pytz.timezone('Asia/Kolkata')); print(cal.get_session(dt, market='NFO') is not None); print(cal.get_session(dt, market='NIFTY') is not None)"

releases.summary: Display rename to AION India Event Intelligence and public output-contract cleanup.
highlights: Standardizes the public product identity as AION India Event Intelligence.
Standardizes the output around sector_vector and sector_directional_bias.
Removes public recommendation framing from docs, MCP metadata, and tutorial surfaces.
validation: python -c "from aion_news_to_signal import analyze; r=analyze('RBI hikes repo rate by 25 bps'); print('sector_vector' in r); print('sector_directional_bias' in r)"
